---
title: "Deseq analysis comparing between days of gene expression"
author: "Yubin Xie"
format: 
  html:
    self-contained: true
editor: visual
echo: False
---

```{r setup}
#| output: False
# import packages
library(readxl)
library(tidyverse)
library(writexl)
library(ggthemes)

```

```{r}
#| output: False

# Installing deseq2
if (!require("BiocManager", quietly = TRUE)) {
    install.packages("BiocManager")
}

BiocManager::install("DESeq2")

```

Loading in the Data

```{r}
gene_expression <- read_excel("/Users/yubin/Documents/School/Bio Stuff/Bios_20151/Final Project/B-Cell Gene Expression Data.xlsx", col_types = c("text", "text", "skip", "skip", rep("numeric", 18)))
view(gene_expression)
```

## Creating a Simple Visual Plot comparing day0 and day1 genetic concentration 

```{r}
#| title: "Simple Plot"
#| fig-cap: "We see a more of a dip in the B-cell gene expression level after 24 hours compare to none b-cell genes"

ggplot(gene_expression, aes(x = s1_Apheresis_day0, y = s1_Apheresis_day1)) +
  geom_point(aes(color=Is_B_Cell)) + geom_smooth(method='lm') +
  labs(title = "Gene Expression", subtitle = "More words", x="Day0 for patient one", y= "Day1 for patient one")
  scale_color_colorblind()
  
```

## Deseq2

```{r}
)
```
